title: Premium skincare packaging: retouch hero shot, vectorize logo, render authored dieline + data-merge SKU labels, print-ready PDFs
one_line_ask: Take Aurelia Botanics' supplied hero serum photo, logo, authored carton dieline (.ai) + label (.indd) and SKU data, and produce retouched/CMYK-graded imagery, a clean vector logo, data-merged print-ready label PDFs for all 3 SKUs, and high-res mockup assets.

issues: Background is off-white rather than pure white (acceptable for source asset per brief).
Very slight paper tilt and visible edge (acceptable for source asset per brief).
Some minor luminance noise and soft edges (acceptable for source asset per brief).
Very slight luminance noise on the cream background (acceptable for source file)
A few line intersections create minor visual complexity in the centre that could challenge clean halftone separation, but within acceptable range for a source asset
Edges of the paper show very subtle yellowing/aging tone — designer will need to neutralise to true white for print-safe output
Pattern density is slightly heavier in the centre-left quadrant, marginally affecting repeat-friendliness, but correctable in layout
Very slight tilt present as intended — within acceptable brief parameters
Dropper pipette visible through glass showing a small liquid droplet mid-shaft, which adds authentic realism but could be flagged by some clients as needing retouching
Shallow depth of field causes very subtle softness at bottle base edges — within acceptable brief parameters
Faint luminance noise visible in background gradient — within acceptable brief parameters
Near-white/light-grey seamless background with subtle gradient reflection present as specified
No label on bottle as required

qc.note: qc refreshed after regenerating logo as genuine RGBA transparent PNG (prior checkerboard-fake-transparency defect fixed); matches passing verification panel

assets.name: aurelia_carton_dieline.ai
assets.note: Client-provided .ai template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).

assets.name: aurelia_label_template.indd
assets.note: Client-provided .indd template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).

assets.name: brand_guide.pdf
assets.note: AO-64 audit fix: regenerated as a genuine 4-page CMYK PDF (was a markdown stub with .pdf extension). Content = spec sections; brand colors preserved.
